name: Goodreads: Book Search
summary: Search Goodreads by keyword/title/author and return book candidate rows with title, URL, author, average rating, and ratings count.
description: Drives the real Goodreads navbar search box (homepage -> type -> submit) and reads the classic server-rendered results table (tr[itemtype*='Book']). Returns one row per book with the canonical /book/show/<id>-slug URL to feed into goodreads/book, goodreads/reviews, or goodreads/similar. Pure read.

search_query.description: Title, author, ISBN, or keyword. Defaults to Goodreads' book search surface (showing N books).

steps.name: Type the query into the navbar search box

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const norm=(s)=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();const origin=location.origin;const cleanPath=(h)=>{const m=(h||'').match(/\/book\/show\/[^?#]+/);return m?m[0]:'';};const rows=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll("tr[itemtype*='Book']"));const out=[];for(const r of rows){const a=r.querySelector('a.bookTitle');if(!a)continue;const title=norm(a.textContent);const path=cleanPath(a.getAttribute('href'));if(!title||!path)continue;const author=norm(r.querySelector('a.authorName')?.textContent);const mini=norm(r.querySelector('.minirating')?.textContent);const rm=mini.match(/([0-9.]+)\s*avg rating/i);const cm=mini.match(/([0-9,]+)\s*ratings?/i);out.push({title:title,book_url:origin+path,author:author||'N/A',avg_rating:rm?rm[1]:'N/A',ratings_count:cm?cm[1].replace(/,/g,''):'N/A'});}return {query:cleanArg(arg0)||null,count:out.length,results:out};

help.summary: Search Goodreads by keyword/title/author; returns book candidate rows.

examples.command: rzn-browser run goodreads search --param search_query="raising a secure child"
rzn-browser run goodreads search --param search_query="Daniel J. Siegel"

returns: Object: { query, count, results: [{ title, book_url, author, avg_rating, ratings_count }] }. Feed book_url into goodreads/book, goodreads/reviews, or goodreads/similar.
notes: Drives the real navbar search box and submits the form (looks human; avoids hitting /search?q= directly).
Results come from Goodreads' classic server-rendered table (~20 rows per page).
avg_rating / ratings_count are parsed from the .minirating cell; either may be 'N/A' for sparsely-rated books.
